markdown:
# Speedy

You gain the following benefits.

## Speed Increase

Your [[speed]] increases by 10 feet.

## Dash over Difficult Terrain

When you take the [[dash]] action on your turn, [[difficult_terrain Terrain]] doesn't cost you extra movement for the rest of that turn.

## Agile Movement

[[opportunity_attack Attacks]] have [[disadvantage]] against you.
